name: International B2B Sales Enablement Framework
description: Build localized B2B sales playbooks, objection-handling scripts, and account-based outreach sequences for any overseas market. Go from 'we should sell there' to a complete sales enablement kit with market-specific talk tracks and ROI calculators.
author: Pearl-led OpenClaw team
safety: Sales enablement advice must be adapted to local commercial law, procurement rules, and truthful-claims requirements.
